Who's got a virtual machine and is about to play through an life changing round of TextWorld? You do! Here is how to play! First of all, you could, like, attempt to go north. Next, make an attempt to venture east. And then, head north. Then, take a trip west. And then, retrieve the coin from the floor of the chamber. And if you do that, you're the winner!
